summary:
I updated the ring buffer to use acquire–release semantics on the atomic indices:

• In ringbuf_push: load read_idx with memory_order_acquire, store write_idx with memory_order_release.  
• In ringbuf_pop: load write_idx with memory_order_acquire, store read_idx with memory_order_release.

This ensures proper ordering of data and index updates on weak-memory architectures. All functional and fallback tests now pass with no corruption. Let me know if you need further adjustments!
